creator: brent@rcfile.org
text:
snmpwalk causes loop in snmpd.  The default snmpd configuration as of
2001-11-06 causes the following output from snmpwalk (verified from three different snmpwalk clients).

$ snmpwalk localhost public udp
[...]
udp.udpTable.udpEntry.udpLocalPort.10.0.0.1.53 = 53
udp.udpTable.udpEntry.udpLocalPort.66.57.26.120.53 = 53
udp.udpTable.udpEntry.udpLocalPort.127.0.0.1.53 = 53
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.161.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.1024.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.53.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:7f00:1
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.53.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:a00:1
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'............B9.x'.53.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:4239:1a78
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.514.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.514.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.514.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0
udp.ipv6UdpTable.ipv6UdpEntry.ipv6UdpLocalAddress.'................'.514.0 = 0:0:0:0:0:0:0:0

this last line repeats infinitely (AFAICT).

Fix: 

snmp newbie, sorry :-\
How-To-Repeat: start snmpd on 4.4-STABLE (2001-11-06), then
$ snmpwalk localhost public udp
